data.body:
[Special December Update Survey!]

To celebrate the December update, a special survey is now live!

By participating, you’ll be able to share your valuable feedback with us—
and receive various rewards, including Pyroxenes!

➡️Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3028&thread=3302512

#BlueArchive
